ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: High quality, text-based PDF. All fields clearly legible.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: High quality, text-based PDF. All fields clearly legible.

document_classification.classification_notes: Document A page 1 is clearly a Certificate of Origin (EU format, ICC accredited, West Sweden Chamber of Commerce). Document A page 2 contains an embedded copy of the invoice within the certificate file. Document B page 1 is the separate invoice file (identical content to embedded copy). Per rule 8.5.0, verification shall use the invoice from Document B (the separate invoice file).

pairing_validation.motivation: Certificate consignor 'Cellmark AB' is identifiable as the invoice issuer 'CELLMARK AB'. Certificate consignee 'QATAR DEVELOPMENT BANK' matches the invoice's FOR/CONSIGNEE field. No invoice number is referenced in the certificate, but consignor and consignee criteria are met. Pairing validation passes.

lc_check.motivation: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The certificate number 'SEG-26D-432141' does not contain 'LC' as a separate field label or bank term. No LC-related fields or labels found anywhere in the certificate.

candidates.normalized_text: södra blue - northern bleached softwood kraft pulp (ecf)

candidates.normalized_text: elite paper industry w.l.l., building no 84, po box 24366, str 4f, zone 81, new industrial area, doha, qatar

candidates.normalized_text: qatar development bank, grand hamad str., doha, qatar

candidates.normalized_text: södra blue - northern bleached softwood kraft pulp

FOR/CONSIGNEE: QATAR DEVELOPMENT BANK, GRAND HAMAD STR., DOHA, QATAR
candidates.normalized_text: qatar development bank, grand hamad str., doha, qatar

evidence.description: Invoice VAT number (SE prefix confirms Sweden)

evidence.raw_text: FOR/CONSIGNEE: QATAR DEVELOPMENT BANK, GRAND HAMAD STR., DOHA, QATAR
SÖDRA BLUE - NORTHERN BLEACHED SOFTWOOD KRAFT PULP (ECF)
SÖDRA BLUE - NORTHERN BLEACHED SOFTWOOD KRAFT PULP
WE CERTIFY THAT THIS INVOICE IS TRUE AND CORRECT AND THAT THE GOODS ARE OF SWEDEN ORIGIN

consignor.certificate_value: Cellmark AB, Box 11927, SE404 39, GÖTEBORG, Sweden
consignor.invoice_value: CELLMARK AB, Lilla Bommen 3C, BOX 11927, 404 39 GOTHENBURG, SWEDEN

comparison_steps.description: Koncernstruktur – search for consignor name in invoice
comparison_steps.detail: Consignor 'Cellmark AB' found in invoice as 'CELLMARK AB' in footer/issuer block, 'CellMark' in header branding, and 'CellMark AB' in certification statement. Direct match after case normalization.

Company name: 'Cellmark AB' (cert) vs 'CELLMARK AB' (invoice) — identical after case normalization. Country: 'Sweden' (cert) vs 'SWEDEN' (invoice footer) — identical. Also confirmed by VAT prefix 'SE' in SE556244243301.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur – consignor name found in invoice issuer block
Land verification via indirect identifiers (VAT prefix SE)
rules_applied.result: Country confirmed via VAT prefix SE

consignor.motivation: Certificate consignor 'Cellmark AB, Sweden' is directly identifiable as the invoice issuer 'CELLMARK AB, SWEDEN'. The company name matches exactly after case normalization. The country Sweden is explicitly stated in the invoice footer and confirmed by the VAT prefix 'SE' in SE556244243301. Box address 'BOX 11927' and postal code '404 39' also match between documents. MATCH per rules 4.1.0 and 4.1.2.
consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate text: 'Cellmark AB, Box 11927, SE404 39, GÖTEBORG, Sweden'. Invoice text: 'CELLMARK AB, Lilla Bommen 3C, BOX 11927, 404 39 GOTHENBURG, SWEDEN'. Normalizations applied: case normalization (Cellmark AB → cellmark ab = CELLMARK AB → cellmark ab). The slight address format difference (GÖTEBORG vs GOTHENBURG) is immaterial per rule 4.1.5 (address differences do not cause MISMATCH). Rule 4.1.0 applied: consignor name found directly in invoice. Rule 4.1.4: Sweden = Sweden → MATCH.

consignee.certificate_value: FOR/CONSIGNEE: QATAR DEVELOPMENT BANK, GRAND HAMAD STR., DOHA QATAR
consignee.invoice_value: FOR/CONSIGNEE: QATAR DEVELOPMENT BANK, GRAND HAMAD STR., DOHA, QATAR

comparison_steps.description: Priority order – identify primary billing field
comparison_steps.detail: Invoice Buyer block contains 'FOR/CONSIGNEE: QATAR DEVELOPMENT BANK, GRAND HAMAD STR., DOHA, QATAR'. This is the primary consignee identification field.
Company name: 'QATAR DEVELOPMENT BANK' (cert) exactly matches 'QATAR DEVELOPMENT BANK' (invoice). Country: 'Qatar' (cert) matches 'QATAR' (invoice).

rules_applied.description: Priority order for consignee identification – invoice buyer block used
rules_applied.result: Consignee identified in invoice Buyer block

consignee.motivation: Certificate consignee 'QATAR DEVELOPMENT BANK, GRAND HAMAD STR., DOHA QATAR' is directly identifiable in the invoice Buyer block as 'FOR/CONSIGNEE: QATAR DEVELOPMENT BANK, GRAND HAMAD STR., DOHA, QATAR'. The company name matches exactly. The country Qatar matches. The address 'GRAND HAMAD STR., DOHA' matches. Also confirmed in invoice Remarks section. MATCH per rules 4.2.0.2, 4.2.2, and 4.2.3.
consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate text: 'FOR/CONSIGNEE: QATAR DEVELOPMENT BANK, GRAND HAMAD STR., DOHA QATAR'. Invoice text: 'FOR/CONSIGNEE: QATAR DEVELOPMENT BANK, GRAND HAMAD STR., DOHA, QATAR'. The only difference is a missing comma before 'QATAR' in the certificate, which is immaterial punctuation. Company name 'QATAR DEVELOPMENT BANK' is identical in both. Country 'Qatar' = 'QATAR' after case normalization. MATCH.

goods_description.certificate_value: SÖDRA BLUE - NORTHERN BLEACHED SOFTWOOD KRAFT PULP (ECF), HS CODE: 470321000000
goods_description.invoice_value: SÖDRA BLUE - NORTHERN BLEACHED SOFTWOOD KRAFT PULP, HS Code: 47032100

comparison_steps.detail: No specific article/part numbers are stated in the certificate. HS codes are customs classification codes, not article numbers. Proceed to Priority 2.

comparison_steps.description: Controlled text matching – identify identity-bearing main designation
comparison_steps.detail: Identity-bearing main designation in certificate: 'SÖDRA BLUE - NORTHERN BLEACHED SOFTWOOD KRAFT PULP'. Invoice description: 'SÖDRA BLUE - NORTHERN BLEACHED SOFTWOOD KRAFT PULP'. Exact match. The additional '(ECF)' in the certificate is a non-identity-bearing addition (specification/quality mark) per rule 4.3.4.

rules_applied.description: Controlled text matching – identity-bearing main designation
rules_applied.result: MATCH – exact text match of main designation

rules_applied.description: Non-identity-bearing additions – (ECF) is a quality/process specification
rules_applied.result: Addition (ECF) does not affect product identity

goods_description.motivation: The identity-bearing main designation 'SÖDRA BLUE - NORTHERN BLEACHED SOFTWOOD KRAFT PULP' in the certificate matches exactly with the invoice description 'SÖDRA BLUE - NORTHERN BLEACHED SOFTWOOD KRAFT PULP'. The additional '(ECF)' in the certificate is a process specification (Elemental Chlorine Free) that does not change the product identity per rule 4.3.4. HS code in certificate (470321000000) is consistent with invoice HS code (47032100) — the certificate's code has additional trailing zeros which is a standard extension format. MATCH.
goods_description.debug_explanation: Certificate text: 'SÖDRA BLUE - NORTHERN BLEACHED SOFTWOOD KRAFT PULP (ECF)'. Invoice text: 'SÖDRA BLUE - NORTHERN BLEACHED SOFTWOOD KRAFT PULP'. Main designation identified as 'SÖDRA BLUE - NORTHERN BLEACHED SOFTWOOD KRAFT PULP'. This exact text string appears in the invoice description. The suffix '(ECF)' in the certificate is a non-identity-bearing addition per 4.3.4 (quality/process specification). No article numbers to verify. MATCH per 4.3.3 and 4.3.4.

comparison_steps.detail: Box 7 contains '395.850 GROSS MT'. This is the verification-grounding quantity per rule 4.4.2.1.

Invoice totals show '395.850 GMT'. Numeric value 395.850 matches exactly. Unit: Certificate says 'GROSS MT', invoice says 'GMT' (Gross Metric Tons). GMT = Gross Metric Tons, which is equivalent to GROSS MT. MATCH.
Certificate Box 6: '195 UNITS / 1560 BALES'. Invoice totals: '195 UNITS' and '1560 BALES'. Both match exactly. Per 4.4.3.1, at least one quantity must be verified — all three are verified.

rules_applied.result: 395.850 GROSS MT identified as primary quantity
Certificate: GROSS MT, Invoice: GMT (Gross Metric Tons) — consistent weight category

rules_applied.description: Multiple quantities – at least one verified
rules_applied.result: All three quantities verified (395.850 GMT, 195 UNITS, 1560 BALES)

quantity.motivation: The primary verification quantity from Box 7 is '395.850 GROSS MT'. The invoice totals show '395.850 GMT' (Gross Metric Tons). The numeric value 395.850 is identical. The weight category GROSS (certificate) = G in GMT (invoice) is consistent. Additionally, 195 UNITS and 1560 BALES from Box 6 match the invoice totals exactly. Per rule 4.4.3.1, at least one quantity must be verified — all three quantities are verified. MATCH.
quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate Box 7: '395.850 GROSS MT'. Invoice totals: '395.850 GMT'. Numeric comparison: 395.850 = 395.850 (exact match). Weight category: GROSS MT (certificate) vs GMT (invoice) — GMT is a standard abbreviation for Gross Metric Tons, which equals GROSS MT. This is a permitted normalization. Additional quantities: 195 UNITS (cert) = 195 UNITS (inv), 1560 BALES (cert) = 1560 BALES (inv). No contradictions found. No undantag (3A-3E) needed — direct occurrence match. MATCH per 4.4.1 and 4.4.3.1.

country_of_origin.invoice_value: MADE IN SWEDEN; GOODS ARE OF SWEDEN ORIGIN

comparison_steps.description: Identification in invoice – search for origin declaration
comparison_steps.detail: Invoice contains two explicit origin statements: (1) Shipping mark: 'MADE IN SWEDEN'; (2) Certification: 'THE GOODS ARE OF SWEDEN ORIGIN'. Both are explicit origin declarations per rule 4.5.1.
Certificate: 'SWEDEN'. Invoice: 'SWEDEN' (in both origin statements). Exact match after case normalization.

rules_applied.description: Origin identification – 'MADE IN' and origin certification statement
rules_applied.result: SWEDEN identified in invoice via explicit origin declarations
MATCH – origin country explicitly identified in invoice

country_of_origin.motivation: Certificate states origin as 'SWEDEN' in Box 3. Invoice contains two explicit origin statements: 'MADE IN SWEDEN' (shipping mark) and 'THE GOODS ARE OF SWEDEN ORIGIN' (certification statement). Both are explicit origin declarations per rule 4.5.1. 'SWEDEN' = 'SWEDEN' — exact match. MATCH.
country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate Box 3: 'SWEDEN'. Invoice Shipping mark: 'MADE IN SWEDEN'. Invoice certification: 'WE CERTIFY THAT THIS INVOICE IS TRUE AND CORRECT AND THAT THE GOODS ARE OF SWEDEN ORIGIN'. Both are explicit origin fields per 4.5.1 ('Made in' and 'Goods are of ... origin'). Country comparison: SWEDEN = SWEDEN. No EU normalization needed (single specific country). MATCH per 4.5.1 and 4.5.5.

rule_evaluation_log.result: No LC reference found in certificate
Certificate from Document A page 1. Invoice from Document B page 1. Document A page 2 contains an embedded invoice copy — not used for verification per rule 8.5.0.
PASS – consignor and consignee identifiable in invoice
MATCH – Cellmark AB found directly as invoice issuer
Consignee identified in invoice Buyer block (FOR/CONSIGNEE field)

rule_evaluation_log.description: Controlled text matching for goods description

rule_evaluation_log.result: 395.850 GROSS MT used as primary quantity

rule_evaluation_log.description: Multiple quantities – at least one verified

rule_evaluation_log.result: SWEDEN found via 'MADE IN SWEDEN' and origin certification

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The embedded invoice in Document A (certificate file page 2) should be used for verification instead of Document B
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per rule 8.5.0, the invoice for verification must come from the separate invoice file (Document B), not from embedded copies within the certificate file. Both copies are identical in content, so the result is the same, but the principle is maintained.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The addition of '(ECF)' in the certificate goods description constitutes a MISMATCH
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per rule 4.3.4, additions that do not change the product's model, variant, quality, article identity or sales unit are non-identity-bearing. '(ECF)' stands for Elemental Chlorine Free and is a process/quality specification that does not alter the product identity of 'SÖDRA BLUE - NORTHERN BLEACHED SOFTWOOD KRAFT PULP'.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: GMT in the invoice is a different unit than GROSS MT in the certificate
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: GMT is a standard abbreviation for Gross Metric Tons, which is semantically identical to GROSS MT. The numeric value 395.850 matches exactly. This is a permitted normalization of unit abbreviation.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The HS code difference (470321000000 vs 47032100) constitutes a MISMATCH
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: HS codes are customs classification codes, not article numbers. The certificate's HS code 470321000000 contains trailing zeros that extend the base code 47032100. The base code is identical. HS codes are not subject to article number verification rules (Priority 1) — they are part of the goods description context.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The address difference (GÖTEBORG vs GOTHENBURG) for consignor indicates different entities
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: GÖTEBORG is the Swedish name for the city GOTHENBURG (English name). Per rule 4.1.5, differences in street address or city name do not cause MISMATCH for consignor. The company name and country are the determining factors, and both match exactly.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Samtliga kontrollpunkter stämmer överens mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Avsändaren Cellmark AB i Sverige, mottagaren Qatar Development Bank i Qatar, varubeskrivningen Södra Blue - Northern Bleached Softwood Kraft Pulp, kvantiteten 395,850 brutto MT samt ursprungslandet Sverige kan alla verifieras i fakturan. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.
overall_assessment.summary: All five checkpoints (consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, country of origin) verified as MATCH. Certificate consignor Cellmark AB matches invoice issuer CELLMARK AB (Sweden). Consignee Qatar Development Bank matches in both documents (Qatar). Goods description matches exactly (with permissible non-identity-bearing addition ECF). Quantity 395.850 Gross MT matches 395.850 GMT in invoice totals, plus 195 UNITS and 1560 BALES also match. Origin SWEDEN confirmed via 'MADE IN SWEDEN' and origin certification statement in invoice.

sections.invoice_value: CELLMARK AB, Lilla Bommen 3C, BOX 11927, 404 39 GOTHENBURG, SWEDEN
sections.rule_applied: Direkt identifiering av consignor i faktura (koncernstruktur 4.1.0) samt namnverifiering (4.1.2)
sections.motivation: Företagsnamnet 'Cellmark AB' identifieras direkt som fakturautställare 'CELLMARK AB'. Land Sverige bekräftas via explicit angivelse och VAT-prefix SE.

sections.certificate_value: QATAR DEVELOPMENT BANK, GRAND HAMAD STR., DOHA QATAR
sections.invoice_value: FOR/CONSIGNEE: QATAR DEVELOPMENT BANK, GRAND HAMAD STR., DOHA, QATAR
sections.rule_applied: Identifiering via fakturans Buyer-block (FOR/CONSIGNEE-fält) enligt prioritetsordning 4.2.0.2
sections.motivation: Mottagarens företagsnamn 'QATAR DEVELOPMENT BANK' matchar exakt. Land Qatar bekräftas i båda dokumenten.

sections.certificate_value: SÖDRA BLUE - NORTHERN BLEACHED SOFTWOOD KRAFT PULP (ECF), HS CODE: 470321000000
sections.invoice_value: SÖDRA BLUE - NORTHERN BLEACHED SOFTWOOD KRAFT PULP, HS Code: 47032100
sections.rule_applied: Kontrollerad textmatchning av identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning (4.3.3) med tillåtet icke-identitetsbärande tillägg (4.3.4)
sections.motivation: Huvudbeteckningen 'SÖDRA BLUE - NORTHERN BLEACHED SOFTWOOD KRAFT PULP' matchar exakt. Tillägget '(ECF)' i certifikatet är en processspecifikation som inte ändrar produktidentiteten.

sections.rule_applied: Förekomstkontroll av Box 7-kvantitet (4.4.2.1, 4.4.1) samt verifiering av ytterligare kvantiteter (4.4.3.1)
sections.motivation: Primärt kvantitetsvärde 395,850 GROSS MT matchar 395,850 GMT i fakturan. Viktkategori GROSS = G i GMT (Gross Metric Tons). Även 195 UNITS och 1560 BALES matchar exakt.

sections.invoice_value: MADE IN SWEDEN; GOODS ARE OF SWEDEN ORIGIN
sections.rule_applied: Positiv verifiering via explicita ursprungsangivelser i fakturan (4.5.1, 4.5.5)
sections.motivation: Ursprungslandet SWEDEN identifieras i fakturan via 'MADE IN SWEDEN' (shipping mark) och 'THE GOODS ARE OF SWEDEN ORIGIN' (certifieringsuttalande). Exakt matchning.

output_quality_checks.notes: All five checkpoints verified as MATCH with confidence ≥ 0.97. No checkpoint below confidence floor of 0.85. comparison_result IDENTICAL is consistent with all checkpoints being MATCH. workflow_recommendation AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE is consistent with comparison_result IDENTICAL. Final consistency check confirms no MISMATCH motivation contradicts any MATCH status.
